javadoc_before:
/** * An immutable range of objects from a minimum to maximum point inclusive. * *

The objects need to either be implementations of {@link Comparable} * or you need to supply a {@link Comparator}.

* *

#ThreadSafe# if the objects and comparator are thread-safe.

* * @param The type of range values. * @since 3.0 * @since 3.20.1 {@code serialVersionUID} changed from {@code 1L} to {@code 2L}. */
javadoc_after:
